name: Shrimp Calypso
recipeIngredient: 1 pound large shrimp, shelled and deveined
1/2 large mango, peeled and sliced 3/8 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Spread coconut in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake for 4-5 minutes until golden brown.
2. In a medium bowl, combine salt, dried oregano, dried thyme, ground cumin, paprika, cayenne pepper, and black pepper. Sprinkle the mixture over shrimp and toss well. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add shallots and shrimp; sauté until shrimp turn pink, about 2 minutes.
4. Add wine and orange juice; cook until almost all liquid is absorbed. Add mango and cook until heated through, about 1 minute more.
5. Remove pan from heat and stir in cilantro. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
6. Transfer shrimp to warmed dinner plates. Sprinkle with toasted coconut flakes and serve immediately.
